inline_comments.message: Added this as I was getting an error when the container was starting up. This was the recommnded fix I could find
can you add a comment to explain why this was added in teh code itself (please refer to teh actual erro you got)

When updating to sprinboot 2.6.4 an exception would occur when starting the container  "Failed to start bean 'documentationPluginsBootstrapper'. 

This is a known issue with springfox and springboot introduced in 2.6.x:
* https://github.com/springfox/springfox/issues/3462
* https://stackoverflow.com/questions/40241843/failed-to-start-bean-documentationpluginsbootstrapper-in-spring-data-rest

During the course of researching this I found a post that suggested migrate to SpringDoc as SpringFox is deprecated and abandoned (?)
https://springdoc.org/migrating-from-springfox.html
